prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 9. Changes in and Disagreements with Accountants on Accounting and Financial Disclosure".
Find where Item 8 ends: right before the "Item 9" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 8 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
The following table presents the revenues and gross profit by operating segment using sources (in million).
Year Ended December 31,
2023 2022 2021
Automotive segment
Revenues $ 90,738 $ 77,553 $ 51,034
Gross profit $ 16,519 $ 20,565 $ 13,735
